ValidationRule.description: Prevents edits to Type, Reason, and Origin when Origin is Company.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISNEW()), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Origin__c), "CO"), OR( ISCHANGED(Type), ISCHANGED(Reason__c), ISCHANGED(Origin__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Type, Reason, and Origin are locked when Origin is Company.
